assertions.text: earns-the-name: The description earns/justifies the 'Death March' name rather than softening it
assertions.evidence: 'it will absolutely destroy your quads', 'no bailing early', 'aching legs and a face that can't quite decide whether to grin or grimace' — leans into the brutality throughout

assertions.text: suffering-to-reward-arc: Captures the arc: brutal upper section → beautiful lower canyon payoff
assertions.evidence: Explicitly structures: 'The upper section near the towers is exposed and technical' → 'But then the canyon opens up... cool shade, wildflowers in July'

assertions.text: mentions-car-shuttle: Mentions the car shuttle requirement as a practical necessity
assertions.evidence: 'You'll need a car shuttle, which means you have to commit, no bailing early'

assertions.text: sensory-specifics: Uses sensory or physical detail (quads, creek, wildflowers, snow, etc.) rather than vague adjectives
assertions.evidence: 'destroy your quads', 'picking your feet up', 'snow doesn't clear until June', 'cool shade, wildflowers in July, the creek doing its thing', 'aching legs'

assertions.text: no-generic-opener: Does NOT start with a generic opener like 'Nestled in...' or 'If you're looking for...'
assertions.evidence: Opens with 'The name says it all.'
